title: caprifolium periclymenum
intro: Caprifolium periclymenum, also known as sweet woodruff, is a perennial flowering plant in the honeysuckle family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. The health benefits of sweet woodruff include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal teas and remedies. Herbal preparations of sweet woodruff can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used to calm the nervous system and promote a restful night's sleep.
